name: Lindsey Graham
subject: Brad Pitt
body:
I'll get right to the point: Brad Pitt would have a better shot of being on the debate stage than real candidates for president. | |

---
---
|
Dear Friend,

I'll get right to the point: if the cable news channels or political elite have their way, the media will have a louder voice in our nominating contest than actual Republican voters. Under the current debate rules supported by the RNC, **Brad Pitt would have a better shot of being on the debate stage than real candidates for president**.

Historically, Republicans in early voting states like Iowa, New Hampshire, and my home of South Carolina have - through the ballot box - been the first to decide which candidates should move on and which should not. Voters should control our nominating process for president - NOT the media.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28901207:27756809229:m:1:877327319:692EE1D9216461CFE3AADB9A268DBE8C:r)

Under the rules from the media and supported by the RNC, the only way to get a ticket to the debate stage is to have a high national polling number. This criterion favors celebrities and candidates who have run previously with high name recognition. **If you care about the Iowa Caucuses, New Hampshire primary, or contests in other early states, this is the beginning of the end.**

[**If you agree that all candidates should have their voices heard on the debate stage in an equal manner, then please sign our urgent petition today.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28901207:27756809229:m:1:877327319:692EE1D9216461CFE3AADB9A268DBE8C:r)

Unless we act quickly, the judgment and influence of Republican voters will be replaced by the national media. And for some disappointing reason, the RNC seems fine with that plan. If you believe the media knows best, don't sign our petition. But if you believe that our nominating process works best when informed Republicans get to see all of the candidates and judge for themselves, then [**I hope you will sign our petition right now.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28901207:27756809229:m:1:877327319:692EE1D9216461CFE3AADB9A268DBE8C:r)

Sincerely,

Lindsey Graham

P.S. The voters in the early primary states should be able to hear from EVERY candidate, not just the ones determined by national polls. If we don't act now, Brad Pitt, with his celebrity status, would have a better chance of getting on a debate stage than actual candidates. [**Please sign our petition right now**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28901207:27756809229:m:1:877327319:692EE1D9216461CFE3AADB9A268DBE8C:r) and make sure we have a real debate with equal rules for all! |

| Paid for by Lindsey Graham 2016

---

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system April 14, 2015.
For more information [click here](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iWkG5mU1Nf). [Update your preferences](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWkG5mU1Nf)

name: Rob Russo, Official Clinton Campaign
subject: Get a birthday note from Hillary - and send one to a friend!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Get a birthday card from Hillary! | Friend --

Every year, Hillary sends me a note on my birthday. Here’s the actual email she sent me this year:
> _From: H
> To: Robert Russo
> Date: Fri, May 22, 2015 at 8:35 a.m.
> Subject: Happy Birthday to YOU!
>
> Rob,
>
> So happy we're still working together after all these years. Enjoy your special day--H_

I think this tradition says something about the kind of person Hillary is. She remembers people's birthdays and lets them know she's thinking of them.

It's a simple gesture, but it means a lot -- and I'm so excited that this year, she's including supporters like you in this tradition.

**[If you just confirm your birthday here, Hillary will send you a note, too!](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjI5OTc4MDYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAwNjQzOTIyS0&mt=1&rt=0)**
[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjI5OTc4MDYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAwNjQzOTIyS0&mt=1&rt=0)

Got a friend (or mom?) who might smile when they see a card from Hillary in their inbox? **[Add their name here.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjI5OTc4MDYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAwNjQzOTIyS0&mt=1&rt=0)**
[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjI5OTc4MDYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAwNjQzOTIyS0&mt=1&rt=0)

**Trust me, it’s really a delight when her name pops up in your inbox on your birthday. Just wait and see!

[https://www.hillaryclinton.com/your-birthday-card/](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjI5OTc4MDYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAwNjQzOTIyS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Thanks,

Rob

Robert Russo
Director of Correspondence and Briefings
Hillary for America

| | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjI5OTc4MDYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAwNjQzOTIyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjI5OTc4MDYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAwNjQzOTIyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjI5OTc4MDYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAwNjQzOTIyS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjI5OTc4MDYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAwNjQzOTIyS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjI5OTc4MDYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAwNjQzOTIyS0&mt=1&rt=0). Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjI5OTc4MDYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAwNjQzOTIyS0&mt=1&rt=0)
